name: date-picker
description: A keyboard-accessible date picker: a trigger opens a calendar dialog with a role=grid of days, roving tabindex, arrow/Home/End/PageUp/PageDown navigation, Enter to select and Escape to close.

notes: Implements the ARIA calendar grid: role=grid with gridcells and roving tabindex
Arrow keys move by day, Home/End jump to the week edges, PageUp/PageDown change month
Enter/Space select; Escape closes and returns focus to the trigger
Each day button is labelled with its full date; today carries aria-current=date
The selected day's gridcell has aria-selected; out-of-range days are disabled

intents: a date picker with an accessible calendar
pick a date from a keyboard-navigable calendar grid
a date field with month navigation and min/max
